name: writing-platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"

//overrides: Force-resolve transitive glob to a non-deprecated version. js-beautify@1.15.4 (pulled in by @vue/test-utils) declares glob: ^10.4.5, which npm was resolving to glob@10.5.0 — flagged as deprecated for known security vulnerabilities. glob@11 is API-compatible for js-beautify's use (file pattern enumeration in its CLI).
